_comment: Example .nilsson/config.json `project` descriptor (issue #9). Copy the `project` block into your project's .nilsson/config.json. Used by the workflows/run_local/ workflow (and future run_remote/preview workflows). Pick a `port` that is NOT Nilsson's port — the run_local workflow refuses on collision.

project._remote_example: Set target to 'remote' and fill remote.url to serve it elsewhere. A future run_remote workflow will use remote.sync as a pluggable preview hook.

sync: cd app && git fetch origin && git checkout -B preview origin/preview && sudo systemctl restart app
